subtitle: The time of magic and artifice

events.title: First peoples are recorded.
events.text: Here appears the first surviving record of sentient activities.

events.title: Dragons Emerge.
events.text: Dragons are documented, as a new and never seen phenomena.

events.title: The Artificium
events.text: Dolor of Tahlena, now only a mythical figure creates a first artifice device.

events.title: The City of Sain is established.
events.text: Establishment ofCity of Sain in the southern part of the continent.

events.title: First Empire of Sain
events.text: First united Empire of Sain emerges, under the great Khan.

events.title: Grand Gardens of Kriggz are finished
events.text: The Grand Gardens on the moon Kirggz are finished for all to see, as a show of might from the Empire of Sain.

events.title: The Continent becomes known as the Land of Sain
events.text: As the Empire of Sain cements its dominance.

events.title: Pinnacle of the Empire of Sain
events.text: The Empire of Sain reachies its largest extent, controlling more than 80% of the discovered landmass.

events.title: The New Schism
events.text: Not much is known today about the New Schism, but it was a first domino to fall in the fall of Sain.

events.title: The Existences from beyond arrive
events.text: The First known sighting of the Existances from beyond - grand creatures from outside the Land of Sain.

events.title: Starbeast's Emissary arrives
events.text: The people are tempted by an Existance from beyond.

events.title: Starbeast takes control over the Empire of Sain
events.text: As the reign of 12 tyrants begins.

events.title: The Grand Fire - Start of the dark ages
events.text: All the knowledge of Sain is destroyed in the Grand Carnival for the enjoyment of people, as they did not know what they did.

events.title: The Five assembles
events.text: Five brave heroes of unknown origin begin to stand against the influence of the Starbeast and 12 tyrants.

events.title: The First tyrant falls
events.text: Only 11 more to go.

events.title: The last tyrant falls
events.text: And now only Starbeast's Emissary remains.

events.title: The Emissary is killed - the destruction of the City of Sain
events.text: What remians is only ruins and death, as anyone who ventures there will die.

events.title: The Aptheosis of the Five
events.text: Where they claim their rightful place.

events.title: Wars of the Bog begin
events.text: The wars bring death, but also innovation. This series of conflicts propels science forward.

events.title: Discovery of Gunpowder
events.text: «The humane and effective way to solve the problem of enemy positions».
